rows.label: xs32180100_MSG0010
rows.name:
The transfer system is still in
the testing phase, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32180100_MSG0020
rows.name:
the retrofitting of the
New White Whale is complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32180100_MSG0030
rows.name:
We're going to unveil it
now, so come outside.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32180100_MSG0040
rows.name: That sounds like something to look forward to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32180100_MSG0050
rows.name: What do you think? Want to go take a look?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32180100_MSG0080
rows.name: I definitely want to go too, mo![ST:wait ]
